_NOTE: PLACEHOLDER DATA FOR LOCAL DEVELOPMENT ONLY. Run scripts/scrape_catalog.py against the live SHL catalog and overwrite this file before deploying/submitting -- the hard-eval check requires every recommended URL to come from the real scrape.

items.name: Java 8 (New)
items.description: Measures knowledge of core Java 8 syntax, OOP concepts, collections, and language features for developer roles.

items.name: Core Java (Entry Level)
items.description: Entry-level Java knowledge assessment covering syntax, control structures, and basic OOP.

items.name: Java Design Patterns
items.description: Assesses understanding of common design patterns applied in Java applications.

items.name: Selenium
items.description: Measures knowledge of Selenium for automated web testing.

items.name: SQL Server
items.description: Assesses SQL querying and SQL Server database knowledge.

items.name: Python (New)
items.description: Measures Python programming knowledge including syntax, data structures, and OOP.

items.name: JavaScript (New)
items.description: Assesses core JavaScript language knowledge for front-end and full-stack roles.

items.name: OPQ32r
items.description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measuring 32 workplace personality dimensions relevant to performance and style.

items.name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
items.description: Measures the conditions and incentives that drive an individual's motivation at work.

items.name: General Ability Test (GAT)
items.description: Short measure of general cognitive ability combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning.

items.name: Verify General Ability (GA)
items.description: Adaptive test of general cognitive ability used broadly across roles and levels.

items.name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
items.description: Adaptive measure of numerical reasoning ability.

items.name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
items.description: Adaptive measure of verbal comprehension and reasoning ability.

items.name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
items.description: Adaptive measure of inductive/logical reasoning ability.

items.name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
items.description: A broad screening assessment combining cognitive ability and foundational workplace skills, often used for early-stage screening across many roles.

items.name: Situational Judgement Test (SJT) - Supervisory
items.description: Presents realistic supervisory scenarios to assess judgment and decision-making style.

items.name: Coding Pro - Data Structures & Algorithms
items.description: Live coding simulation assessing data structure and algorithm problem solving in a real IDE.

items.name: Technology Professional 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
items.description: Combines ability, personality, and competency measures tailored to technology professional roles.

items.name: Customer Service 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
items.description: Combined assessment for customer service roles measuring relevant ability, personality, and competencies.

items.name: Workplace Personality Inventory (WPI)
items.description: Measures personality traits predictive of workplace behavior and fit.

items.name: Sales Aptitude Assessment
items.description: Assesses aptitude and competencies relevant to sales performance.

items.name: C# (New)
items.description: Measures C# programming language knowledge.

items.name: Agile Software Development
items.description: Assesses knowledge of Agile methodologies and practices used in software development.

items.name: Project Management Knowledge
items.description: Measures core project management concepts and terminology.

items.name: Leadership Skills Assessment
items.description: Assesses leadership competencies and behavioral style for management roles.
